title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with a single command-line tool and a built-in model registry.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client/SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same features as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLMs or embedders inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama—chat, multi-model, file upload, RAG, user management, dark mode.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async, streaming, embeddings, custom timeouts.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit to chat over your documents.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama model replies into any channel via slash commands.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducible Ollama builds on Linux/macOS with CUDA and ROCm variants.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir NIF wrapper around Ollama’s REST API for realtime chat and embeddings in Phoenix apps.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Community-maintained collection of unofficial SDKs (Go, C#, Ruby, PHP) for Ollama.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Lightweight Rust crate providing async/await bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client for Ollama with LINQ-style chat builders and Blazor sample app.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community hub of Modelfiles for fine-tuned, quantized, or domain-specific models ready for ollama pull.

title: reddit/r/ollama
summary: Active subreddit for announcements, troubleshooting, and showcases around the Ollama ecosystem.

title: ollama on Hacker News
summary: Discussion thread comparing Ollama performance with llama.cpp and local GPU stacks.
